title: Suixing Xiugai
description: Randomly implement or modify some issues or suggestions in other mods
body:
## This Mod currently makes the following modifications:

### When installed with iceandfire:
- Provides the game rule iceAndFireDragonPVP to adjust damage between tamed dragons and their owners (disabled by default).
- Provides the configuration enableDragonResurrectionCommand to use the following command to resurrect dead dragons (enabled by default).
- ```/iceandfire dragonresurrection <targets> <healthCost>```

### When installed with Twilight Forest:
- Lich's shields can be broken by more types of damage (disabled by default). ~~Damage caused by throwing ender pearls at the Lich's face can also break shields.~~
- Number of Lich's shields. (default 6).
- Fortification wand changed to right-click to apply shields to the target entity aimed at the crosshair (if no target entity, apply to self). (disabled by default).
- Number of shields applied by right-clicking the fortification wand. (default 5).
- Shields applied by the fortification wand are invulnerable to all damage. (disabled by default).
- Usage count of the four wands.
- Naga Dizziness Duration/Damage Threshold Configuration Adjustment (1.0.1+)

Most of the above content can be adjusted in the config/suixingxiugai-common.toml configuration file.

#### Note: Built-in experimental warning is disabled by default and can be adjusted in the configuration file disableExperimentalWarning [enabled by default].
